# ceph_pool (Resource)

Manages a Ceph pool.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the pool.

### Optional

- `application` (String) Application type (e.g. 'rbd').
- `autoscale_mode` (String) PG autoscale mode (e.g. 'on', 'off', 'warn').
- `min_size` (Number) Minimum number of replicas for I/O.
- `pg_num` (Number) Number of placement groups.
- `size` (Number) Replication size of the pool.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal Terraform ID (same as pool name).
